summary: The autonomous prompt now hands one reconciled candidate to the seven-task Plan 12 and stops when Task 7 closes it. It requires one full review for the plan, excludes Wardline and hosted CI, and contains no post-Plan-12 checkpoint or parent milestone closeout.

review_basis.process: Reviewed with the lean Plan 12 and active Stage 9 run sheet as one execution contract.

resolved_findings.resolution: Replaced Tasks 1 through 9 and the final extra checkpoint with Tasks 1 through 6 followed directly by Task 7 release and closure.
Removed hosted CI and Wardline from the executable closeout contract.

verification: Active Stage 9 references agree with the seven-task Plan 12 order.
Targeted searches find no active Task 8, Task 9, Major Checkpoint 6, hosted CI execution, Wardline execution, or post-plan closeout phase.
